---
title: Test
format: 
  html:
    number-sections: true
toastui:
  options-all:
    defaultView: week
    height: 660px
    navigation: true
    date: "2026-04-15"
    file: data/events.tsv
    file-sep: "\t"
    isReadOnly: true
    useDetailPopup: true
    usageStatistics: false
    gridSelection:
      enableClick: true
      enableDblClick: false
    month:
      startDayOfWeek: 1
      narrowWeekend: true
      workweek: false
      visibleWeeksCount: 0
      isAlways6Weeks: true
      visibleEventCount: 6
    week:
      startDayOfWeek: 1
      narrowWeekend: false
      workweek: false
      showNowIndicator: true
      showTimezoneCollapseButton: false
      timezonesCollapsed: false
      hourStart: 6
      hourEnd: 22
      eventView: true
      taskView: true
      collapseDuplicateEvents: false
    timezone:
      zones:
        - timezoneName: Europe/Stockholm
          displayLabel: Stockholm
        - timezoneName: Europe/London
          displayLabel: London
    theme:
      common:
        backgroundColor: "#ffffff"
    template:
      milestone: "${title}"
    calendars:
      - id: cal1
        name: Personal
        color: "#ffffff"
        backgroundColor: "#03bd9e"
        dragBackgroundColor: "#03bd9e"
        borderColor: "#03bd9e"
      - id: cal2
        name: Work
        color: "#ffffff"
        backgroundColor: "#00a9ff"
        dragBackgroundColor: "#00a9ff"
        borderColor: "#00a9ff"

  options-no-nav:
    defaultView: day
    date: "2026-04-15"
    navigation: false
    file: data/events.tsv
    file-sep: "\t"
    week:
      eventView:
        - time
      taskView: false

  options-week-time-only-no-buttons:
    defaultView: week
    navigation: false
    isReadOnly: false
    date: "2026-04-17"
    file: data/events.csv
    file-sep: ","
    week:
      eventView:
        - time
      taskView: false
    calendars:
      - id: cal1
        name: Personal
        backgroundColor: "#03bd9e"
      - id: cal2
        name: Work
        backgroundColor: "#00a9ff"

---

## YAML metadata
### Full configuration

- Calendar renders with custom options
- Events load from file
- Initial date is applied
- Navigation controls are visible

<details>
<summary>Show code</summary>

```yaml
---
toastui:
  options-all:
    defaultView: week
    height: 660px
    navigation: true
    date: "2026-04-15"
    file: data/events.tsv
    file-sep: "\t"
    isReadOnly: true
    useDetailPopup: true
    usageStatistics: false
    gridSelection:
      enableClick: true
      enableDblClick: false
    month:
      startDayOfWeek: 1
      narrowWeekend: true
      workweek: false
      visibleWeeksCount: 0
      isAlways6Weeks: true
      visibleEventCount: 6
    week:
      startDayOfWeek: 1
      narrowWeekend: false
      workweek: false
      showNowIndicator: true
      showTimezoneCollapseButton: false
      timezonesCollapsed: false
      hourStart: 6
      hourEnd: 22
      eventView: true
      taskView: true
      collapseDuplicateEvents: false
    timezone:
      zones:
        - timezoneName: Europe/Stockholm
          displayLabel: Stockholm
        - timezoneName: Europe/London
          displayLabel: London
    theme:
      common:
        backgroundColor: "#ffffff"
    template:
      milestone: "${title}"
    calendars:
      - id: cal1
        name: Personal
        color: "#ffffff"
        backgroundColor: "#03bd9e"
        dragBackgroundColor: "#03bd9e"
        borderColor: "#03bd9e"
      - id: cal2
        name: Work
        color: "#ffffff"
        backgroundColor: "#00a9ff"
        dragBackgroundColor: "#00a9ff"
        borderColor: "#00a9ff"

---

{{{< toastui options-all >}}}
```

</details>

{{< toastui options-all >}}

### Navigation disabled

- No custom nav toolbar is shown
- Events load from file and are visible in the calendar
- Initial date is applied
- Week view shows only time panel and hides task/milestone panels

<details>
<summary>Show code</summary>

```yaml
---
toastui:
  options-no-nav:
    defaultView: day
    date: "2026-04-15"
    navigation: false
    file: data/events.tsv
    file-sep: "\t"
    week:
      eventView:
        - time
      taskView: false
---

{{{< toastui options-no-nav >}}}
```

</details>

{{< toastui options-no-nav >}}

### Week view no navigation

- Calendar opens in week view
- Milestone/task/allday panels are hidden (`taskView: false`, `eventView: [time]`)
- Month/week/day buttons are hidden (custom navigation disabled)

<details>
<summary>Show code</summary>

```yaml
---
toastui:
  options-week-time-only-no-buttons:
    defaultView: week
    navigation: false
    isReadOnly: false
    date: "2026-04-17"
    file: data/events.csv
    file-sep: ","
    week:
      eventView:
        - time
      taskView: false
    calendars:
      - id: cal1
        name: Personal
        backgroundColor: "#03bd9e"
      - id: cal2
        name: Work
        backgroundColor: "#00a9ff"
---

{{{< toastui options-week-time-only-no-buttons >}}}
```

</details>

{{< toastui options-week-time-only-no-buttons >}}

## Inline
### Basic

- Inline configuration
- file-sep escape handling works

<details>
<summary>Show code</summary>

```markdown
{{{< toastui file="data/events.tsv" file-sep="\t" defaultView="month" height="480px" navigation="true" date="2026-04-12" >}}}
```

</details>

{{< toastui file="data/events.tsv" file-sep="\t" defaultView="month" height="480px" navigation="true" date="2026-04-12" >}}

### CSV file

- Events load from `data/events.csv`
- Comma-separated parsing works when `file-sep` is set to `,`

<details>
<summary>Show code</summary>

```markdown
{{{< toastui file="data/events.csv" file-sep="," defaultView="month" date="2026-04-15" >}}}
```

</details>

{{< toastui file="data/events.csv" file-sep="," defaultView="month" date="2026-04-15" >}}

### Workshop week

- 20 workshop sessions load from `data/workshop-week.tsv`
- Calendar opens in week view
- Events span across a full training week

<details>
<summary>Show code</summary>

```markdown
{{{< toastui file="data/workshop-week.tsv" file-sep="\t" defaultView="week" date="2026-04-20" useDetailPopup="true" week='{"hourStart": 9, "hourEnd": 17, "eventView":["time"], "taskView": false}' >}}}
```

</details>

{{< toastui file="data/workshop-week.tsv" file-sep="\t" defaultView="week" date="2026-04-20" useDetailPopup="true" week='{"hourStart": 9, "hourEnd": 17, "eventView":["time"], "taskView": false}' >}}

## Failures
### Missing critical column start

- A styled error box is shown in the output document
- Error reports missing required column `start`
- No terminal errors are shown

<details>
<summary>Show code</summary>

```markdown
{{{< toastui file="data/bad-missing-start.csv" file-sep="," defaultView="week" height="420px" >}}}
```

</details>

{{< toastui file="data/bad-missing-start.csv" file-sep="," defaultView="week" height="420px" >}}

### Missing critical column title

- A styled error box is shown in the output document
- Error reports missing required column `title`
- No terminal errors are shown

<details>
<summary>Show code</summary>

```markdown
{{{< toastui file="data/bad-missing-title.tsv" file-sep="\t" defaultView="month" height="420px" >}}}
```

</details>

{{< toastui file="data/bad-missing-title.tsv" file-sep="\t" defaultView="month" height="420px" >}}

### Empty file

- A styled error box is shown in the output document
- Error reports empty events file
- No terminal errors are shown

<details>
<summary>Show code</summary>

```markdown
{{{< toastui file="data/bad-empty.tsv" file-sep="\t" defaultView="week" height="420px" >}}}
```

</details>

{{< toastui file="data/bad-empty.tsv" file-sep="\t" defaultView="week" height="420px" >}}

### File does not exist

- A styled error box is shown in the output document
- Error reports that the file cannot be opened
- No terminal errors are shown

<details>
<summary>Show code</summary>

```markdown
{{{< toastui file="data/does-not-exist.tsv" file-sep="\t" defaultView="week" height="420px" >}}}
```

</details>

{{< toastui file="data/does-not-exist.tsv" file-sep="\t" defaultView="week" height="420px" >}}

### Multiple bad rows (list output)

- A styled error box is shown in the output document
- Multiple validation messages are shown as a list
- No terminal errors are shown

<details>
<summary>Show code</summary>

```markdown
{{{< toastui file="data/bad-multiple-row-errors.csv" file-sep="," defaultView="week" height="420px" >}}}
```

</details>

{{< toastui file="data/bad-multiple-row-errors.csv" file-sep="," defaultView="week" height="420px" >}}

### File without header row

- A styled error box is shown in the output document
- Error reports missing required columns (`title`, `start`, `end`)
- No terminal errors are shown

<details>
<summary>Show code</summary>

```markdown
{{{< toastui file="data/bad-no-header.tsv" file-sep="\t" defaultView="week" height="420px" >}}}
```

</details>

{{< toastui file="data/bad-no-header.tsv" file-sep="\t" defaultView="week" height="420px" >}}
